items.title: FEDS Paper: Contrasting Ledgers: Considerations for U.S. Dollar Interbank Payment Systems
items.desc: Melissa Leistra This paper describes the current U.S. dollar interbank payments landscape and identifies its key characteristics. It then discusses major considerations and potential tradeoffs that various conceptual alternatives might raise.
